news.t: BEEZ: Not Your Average ESG ETF. Should You Buy?

holdings.infoBox: BEEZ is an equity ETF with a total of 27 individual holdings. The top holdings are Lam Research stock at 4.87%, ServiceNow at 4.49%, Agilent Technologies at 4.45%, Badger Meter at 4.37%, and Watts Water Technologies at 4.32%.

overview.description: The Honeytree U.S. Equity ETF (BEEZ) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund is an actively managed fund that seeks capital appreciation by investing in a narrow basket of 25-30 large- and mid-cap US stocks perceived to be demonstrating responsible growth. BEEZ was launched on Nov 6, 2023 and is issued by Honeytree.

data.title: BEEZ: Not Your Average ESG ETF. Should You Buy?
data.text: The Honeytree U.S. Equity ETF (NASDAQ:BEEZ) is an interesting new ESG (environmental, social, and corporate governance) ETF that just launched in November. With a concentrated and actively-managed por...
